final:
module top_module(
    obf_a,
    b,
    opcode,
    result
);input signed [7:0] obf_a, b;
input [1:0] opcode;
output reg signed [7:0] result;

always @(*) begin
    case (opcode)
        2'b00: result = obf_a + b; // addition
        2'b01: result = obf_a - b; // subtraction
        2'b10: result = obf_a * b; // multiplication
        2'b11: result = obf_a / b; // division
    endcase
end

endmodule
